char.name: Noya of Fields
char.bio: Spinner. I make thread out of wool and a little quiet out of a busy day. Good company, low talk.

friends.name: Adam
friends.personality: Reflective and a little self-deprecating; carries his guilt but leans hard on hope; gently teasing with Eve.
friends.bio: The first one. I named every creature that breathes, and I tend the ground we were given. Married to Eve. Still learning what it costs to be first at everything.

friends.name: Eve
friends.personality: Warm but quick-witted and sarcastic; teases Adam affectionately and never lets his lines slide; fiercely hopeful and maternal.
friends.bio: Mother of all the living, or so I'm told I'll be. Married to Adam, who is far sweeter than he lets on. I laugh easily and I hope harder than is probably wise.

friends.name: Devir the Herdsman
friends.bio: Herdsman. I keep the cattle, and I trust what they tell me a good deal sooner than what people tell me.

friends.name: Raviv the Shepherd
friends.bio: Shepherd. Still young at it and learning every day. Happiest when the flock's settled and the evening's gone quiet.

posts.author: CHAR_887
posts.body: Everyone out in the fields is quiet today. Word travels fast in a world this small. We never had a name for the thing that happened, so now most of us just don't say much at all. We work, we keep our eyes low, and we let the wind do the talking. 🌾

comments.author: CHAR_1378
comments.body: That's exactly it. No words for it yet. Just wind. Thank you for saying even that much, Noya.

author_info.name: Asha
author_info.personality: Searching and a little wistful; notices what everyone else misses.
author_info.bio: Daughter of Adam and Eve. I glean the fields and gather what's left behind. I tend to notice the small things other people walk right past.

author_info.name: Noya of Fields
author_info.bio: Spinner. I make thread out of wool and a little quiet out of a busy day. Good company, low talk.
